it("allows accessing $$SEARCH_META inside a $facet subpipeline", function () {

// resulting stage. The opaque callback cannot survive the BSON round-trip, so it is attached

* Re-parses this node into an owned LiteParsedDocumentSource using the expansion-time nss and
+     * options. The default re-parses buildStageBson(); subclasses may override to inject node-held
+     * state (e.g. an extension DPL callback) that cannot survive the BSON round-trip.
const NamespaceString& nss, const LiteParserOptions& options) const;
+        const NamespaceString& nss, const LiteParserOptions& options) const override;
+    // Wraps the shared DPL callback owner into a ShardedPlanProvider closure. Shared by both
+    // expansion paths so the wrapping logic (capture-by-shared-owner, getOrInvoke) lives in one
+    // The extension's distributed-plan callback is carried through the LiteParsed -> StageParams
+    // handoff and attached here so distributedPlanLogic() can produce a sharded merge plan.
tassert(12615007, "Expecting DocumentSource iterator pointing to this stage.", *itr == this);
+    // Flip _returnCursor so the shard-side stage stashes the metadata stream as a secondary cursor
+    // that the router reads, rather than consuming it in-process via $setVariableFromSubPipeline.
+    // Only flip on real execution, since explain paths pass nullptr and must not mutate state.
// Wrap the merge pipeline in $setVariableFromSubPipeline to bind
// Sort pattern for merge-sorting the document results stream across shards, and the
// merge pipeline for the metadata stream on the router. Provided by the configured
-    // source stage via the merge plan provider callback.

* Creates a DocumentSource from StageParams produced by the LiteParsed layer.
+ * Sort pattern for merge-sorting the document results stream across shards, and the merge pipeline
+ * for the metadata stream on the router. Provided by the extension source via a callback that
+ * survives the LiteParsed -> StageParams -> DocumentSource handoff.
* Stage params produced by InternalDocumentResultsAndMetadataLiteParsed and consumed by
+    // Carries the extension's DPL callback through the LiteParsed -> StageParams handoff so the

// Clone the inner sub-pipeline so any view info bound onto it via bindResolvedNamespace()
// travels with the StageParams to DocumentSource construction.
+    // Set when this LiteParsed was constructed from a host-defined AST node carrying the

+    // merge pipeline. Null when constructed via the BSON parse path.
